CREATE TABLE `tbl_attitude_annual` ( `USER_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL COMMENT 'мВђмЫРID', `MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT` decimal(4,1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0 COMMENT 'мЫФм∞® мИШ', `ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT` decimal(4,1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0 COMMENT 'мЧ∞м∞® мИШ', `ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT` decimal(4,1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0 COMMENT 'мґФк∞А мЧ∞м∞® мИШ', `JOIN_DATE` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'мЮЕмВђмЭЉ', `COMPANY_ID` varchar(200) NOT NULL COMMENT 'нЪМмВђID', `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL COMMENT 'нЕМлДМнКЄID', PRIMARY KEY (`USER_ID`,`TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE `tbl_attitude_annual_canappl` ( `ATTITUDE_ID` bigint(20) NOT NULL COMMENT 'кЈЉнГЬID', `APPL_CNT` int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT 'мИШм†ХмЛ†м≤≠нВ§', `COMPANY_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL COMMENT 'нЪМмВђID', `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL COMMENT 'нЕМлДМнКЄID', `WRITER_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL COMMENT 'мЮСмД±мЮРID', `WRITER_NAME` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'мЮСмД±мЮРмЭіл¶Д', `WRITER_NAME2` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'мЮСмД±мЮРмЭіл¶Д2', `WRITER_TITLE` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'мЮСмД±мЮРмІБмЬД', `WRITER_TITLE2` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'мЮСмД±мЮРмІБмЬД2', `WRITER_DEPT_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL COMMENT 'мЮСмД±мЮРлґАмДЬID', `WRITER_DEPT_NAME` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'мЮСмД±мЮРлґАмДЬмЭіл¶Д', `WRITER_DEPT_NAME2` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'мЮСмД±мЮРлґАмДЬмЭіл¶Д2', `DELFLAG` char(1) DEFAULT '0', `APPR_USER_ID` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'мКємЭЄмЮРID', `APPR_DATE` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'мКємЭЄмЭЉмЛЬ', `APPR_STATUS` char(1) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'мКємЭЄмГБнГЬ', `CONTENT` varchar(3000) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'лВімЪ©', `APPR_USER_NAME` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'мКємЭЄмЮРмЭіл¶Д', `APPR_USER_NAME2` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'мКємЭЄмЮРмЭіл¶Д2', `APPL_DATE` datetime DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'мИШм†ХмЛ†м≤≠мЭЉмЛЬ', PRIMARY KEY (`ATTITUDE_ID`,`APPL_CNT`,`COMPANY_ID`,`TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE `tbl_attitude_annual_conf` ( `COMPANY_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, `ANNUAL_CANCEL_RULE` char(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', `USE_ANNUAL_AUTO_GNRT` char(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', `ANNUAL_GNRT_STD` char(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', `INITIAL_DATE` date DEFAULT NULL, `USE_MINUS_ANNUAL` char(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', `USE_ANNUAL_TMNT` char(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', `ROUND_OFF_RULE` char(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1', `CONF_SET_DATE` date NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`COMPANY_ID`,`TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE `tbl_attitude_annual_history` ( `ANNUAL_HISTORY_ID` int(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT 'мЧ∞м∞®мИШм†ХкЄ∞л°ЭID', `USER_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL COMMENT 'мВђмЫРID', `ORIGIN_ANNUAL_CNT` decimal(4,1) NOT NULL COMMENT 'кЄ∞м°імЧ∞м∞®мИШ', `CHANGE_ANNUAL_CNT` decimal(4,1) NOT NULL COMMENT 'мИШм†ХмЧ∞м∞®мИШ', `CHANGE_REASON` varchar(2000) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'мИШм†ХмВђмЬ†', `CHANGE_DATE` datetime NOT NULL COMMENT 'мИШм†ХмЭЉмЮР', `CHANGE_USER_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL COMMENT 'мИШм†ХмЮРID', `COMPANY_ID` varchar(200) NOT NULL COMMENT 'нЪМмВђID', `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL COMMENT 'нЕМлДМнКЄID', PRIMARY KEY (`ANNUAL_HISTORY_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE `tbl_attitude_apr_conn` ( `ATTITUDE_ID` bigint(20) NOT NULL, `USER_ID` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL, `ANNUAL_DOC_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `CANCEL_DOC_ID` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL, `ANNUAL_APPR_STATUS` char(1) DEFAULT NULL, `CANCEL_APPR_STATUS` char(1) DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANY_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`ATTITUDE_ID`,`COMPANY_ID`,`TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE `TBL_RS_PERSPORTLET` ( `CN` VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL COMMENT 'id', `BRD_ID` DECIMAL(22,0) NOT NULL COMMENT 'мЮРмЫРкіАл¶ђ id', `BRD_COMPANY` VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL COMMENT 'company id', `TENANT_ID` MEDIUMINT(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'нЕМлДМнКЄ id', PRIMARY KEY (`TENANT_ID`,`CN`,`BRD_COMPANY`,`BRD_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8
ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_THEME ADD ( THEME_CONTENT2 VARCHAR(400) DEFAULT 'theme content', THEME_NAME2 VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'theme2' )
ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_THEME ADD ( THEME_CONTENT3 VARCHAR(400) DEFAULT 'theme content', THEME_NAME3 VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'theme3' )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME SET THEME_CONTENT2 = CASE WHEN theme_id = 1 THEN 'A theme with a fixed area on the left or right.' WHEN theme_id = 2 THEN 'A theme with a fixed area on the top.' WHEN theme_id = 3 THEN 'A theme that consists of only portlets without fixed areas.' END , THEME_NAME2 = CASE WHEN theme_id = 1 THEN 'Theme1' WHEN theme_id = 2 THEN 'Theme2' WHEN theme_id = 3 THEN 'Theme3' END

UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME SET THEME_CONTENT3 = CASE WHEN theme_id = 1 THEN 'еЫЇеЃЪй†ШеЯЯгВТзФїйЭҐгБЃеП≥гБЊгБЯгБѓеЈ¶гБЂйЕНзљЃгБІгБНгВЛгГЖгГЉгГЮгБІгБЩгАВ' WHEN theme_id = 2 THEN 'еЫЇеЃЪй†ШеЯЯгБМзФїйЭҐгБЃдЄКйГ®гБЂи°®з§ЇгБХгВМгВЛгГЖгГЉгГЮгБІгБЩгАВ' WHEN theme_id = 3 THEN 'еЫЇеЃЪй†ШеЯЯгБМгБ™гБПгАБгБЩгБєгБ¶гБЃгГЭгГЉгГИгГђгГГгГИгВТиЗ™зФ±гБЂйЕНзљЃгБІгБНгВЛгГЖгГЉгГЮгБІгБЩгАВ' END , THEME_NAME3 = CASE WHEN theme_id = 1 THEN 'Theme1' WHEN theme_id = 2 THEN 'Theme2' WHEN theme_id = 3 THEN 'Theme3' END

ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_MENU ADD menucode VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL
ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET ADD portletcode VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_MENU SET menucode = CASE WHEN menu_url like '%ezNewPortal%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'portal' WHEN menu_url like '%mailMain.do' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'mail' WHEN menu_url like '%ezSchedule%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'schedule' WHEN menu_url like '%ezApprovalG%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'approval' WHEN menu_url like '%ezBoard%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'board' WHEN menu_url like '%ezCommunity%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'community' WHEN menu_url like '%ezResource%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'resource' WHEN menu_url like '%ezCircular%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'circular' WHEN menu_url like '%ezJournal%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'journal' WHEN menu_url like '%ezAttitude%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'attitude' WHEN menu_url like '%ezWebFolder%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'webfolder' WHEN menu_url like '%ezCabinet%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'cabinet' WHEN menu_url like '%ezPMS%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'pms' WHEN menu_url like '%mailMain.do?funCode=2%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'address' WHEN menu_url like '%ezQuestion%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'question' WHEN menu_url like '%ezPoll%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'vote' WHEN menu_url like '%ezLadder%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'ladder' WHEN menu_url like '%ezTask%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'task' WHEN menu_url like '%ezMemo%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'memo' WHEN menu_url like '%ezSurvey%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'survey' END

UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET SET portletcode = CASE WHEN portlet_url like '%receivedMailPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'receivedmail' WHEN portlet_url like '%noticePortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'notice' WHEN portlet_url like '%votePortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'vote' WHEN portlet_url like '%pollPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'poll' WHEN portlet_url like '%schedulePortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'schedule' WHEN portlet_url like '%approvalListPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'approvallist' WHEN portlet_url like '%favoriteFormsPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'favoriteforms' WHEN portlet_url like '%photoBoardPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'photoboard' WHEN portlet_url like '%favoriteBoardPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'favoriteboard' WHEN portlet_url like '%communityPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'community' WHEN portlet_url like '%helpPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'help' WHEN portlet_url like '%weatherPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'weather' WHEN portlet_url like '%birthdayPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'birthday' WHEN portlet_url like '%slideImagePortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'slideimage' WHEN portlet_url like '%userInfoPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'userinfo' WHEN portlet_url like '%movieBoardPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'movieboard' WHEN portlet_url like '%countPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'count' WHEN portlet_url like '%resourcePortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'resource' WHEN portlet_url like '%surveyPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'survey' WHEN portlet_url like '%webFolderPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'webfolder' WHEN portlet_url like '%tabBoardPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'tabBoard' END
sqlMap.select: SELECT START_IP startIP, END_IP endIP, START_IP_NUMBER startIPNumber, END_IP_NUMBER endIPNumber, COUNTRY_CODE countryCode, COUNTRY_NAME countryName FROM JMOCHA_MAIL_COUNTRYIP WHERE START_IP_NUMBER <= #changeIp# AND END_IP_NUMBER >= #changeIp#
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `TBL_ACCESS_COUNTRY` ( `TENANT_ID` int(11) NOT NULL, `COUNTRY_CODE` varchar(800) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4
ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH ADD sn INT DEFAULT 0

CREATE TABLE TBL_SHARE_DOC_DIR ( OWNER_ID varchar(45) NOT NULL, SHARE_ID varchar(45) NOT NULL, SHARE_TYPE varchar(45) DEFAULT NULL, TENANT_ID mediumint(5) NOT NULL, OWNER_TYPE varchar(45) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (OWNER_ID,SHARE_ID,TENANT_ID) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4
ALTER TABLE TBL_BOARD_BOARDMANAGE ADD TYPE VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT NULL

CREATE TABLE `tbl_ps_popup_user` ( `itemseq` bigint(20) NOT NULL, `user_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `user_type` varchar(10) NOT NULL, `tenant_id` int(11) NOT NULL, `companyid` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `subdept_permitted` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `sn` int(11) DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY (`itemseq`,`user_id`,`user_type`,`tenant_id`,`companyid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='нМЭмЧЕ к≥µмІА лМАмГБмЮР кіАл†® нЕМмЭілЄФ'
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(member_id) FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo WHERE group_id = #groupId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND ( (member_type = 'USER' AND member_id = #userId#) OR (member_type = 'DEPT' AND (member_id = #deptId# or member_id IN (SELECT deptid FROM tbl_addjobmaster WHERE cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#))) OR (member_type = 'JIKWI' AND member_id IN ( SELECT extensionattribute7 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# UNION DISTINCT SELECT jobid FROM tbl_addjobmaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# ) ) OR (member_type = 'JIKCHEK' AND member_id = (SELECT extensionattribute8 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#))
)

SELECT COUNT(CN) FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE dept_cd_path REGEXP( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(dept_cd_path SEPARATOR '|') FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE cn IN ( SELECT member_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo WHERE group_id = #groupId# AND member_type = 'DEPT' AND sub_dept_yn = 'Y' ) ) AND ( cn = #deptId# OR cn IN (SELECT deptid FROM tbl_addjobmaster WHERE cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) )
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_SURVEY ADD MAIL_SENT_FLAG TINYINT(4) DEFAULT '0'
sqlMap.select:
SELECT a.cn, a.password, a.displayname, a.displayname2, a.department, a.description, a.description2, a.title, a.title2, a.physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, a.company, a.company2, a.updatedt, a.extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, a.telephonenumber, a.mail, a.extensionattribute10 as jikchek, a.tenant_id, (SELECT concat('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primaryLang, a.loginCnt, a.extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, a.extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, a.extensionattribute14 as sabun, a.password_updatedt FROM tbl_usermaster a JOIN tbl_permissiongroupinfo b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id AND a.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND a.cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId#) AND
( (b.member_type = 'JIKCHEK' AND a.extensionattribute8 = b.member_id) OR (b.member_type = 'JIKWI' AND a.extensionattribute7 = b.member_id) OR (b.member_type = 'ORGAN' AND a.physicaldeliveryofficename = b.member_id) OR (b.member_type = 'USER' AND a.cn = b.member_id) OR (b.member_type = 'DEPT' AND a.department = b.member_id)
OR (a.department IN ( SELECT CN FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE dept_cd_path REGEXP( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(dept_cd_path SEPARATOR '|') FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE cn IN ( SELECT member_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo WHERE group_id = #groupId# AND member_type = 'DEPT' AND sub_dept_yn = 'Y' ) ) ) )
) WHERE b.group_id = #groupId# AND a.tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_AUTH ADD sn INT DEFAULT 0
ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH ADD sn INT DEFAULT 0
sqlMap.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE APRTYPE = '007' AND APRSTATE = '002') + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE APRTYPE = '007' AND APRSTATE = '002') AS CNT FROM DUAL
sqlMap.statement: ALTER VIEW vaprdoingdoclist AS SELECT tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCID AS DOCID, tbl_aprdocinfo.FORMID AS FORMID, tbl_aprdocinfo.ORGDOCID AS ORGDOCID, tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCTYPE AS DOCTYPE, CASE WHEN (tbl_aprlineinfo.APRSTATE = '002' AND tbl_aprlineinfo.APRTYPE = '007') THEN '017' ELSE tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCSTATE END AS DOCSTATE, CASE WHEN (tbl_aprlineinfo.APRSTATE = '000' AND tbl_aprdocinfo.FUNCTIONTYPE <> '004') THEN '002' ELSE tbl_aprdocinfo.FUNCTIONTYPE END AS FUNCTIONTYPE, tbl_aprdocinfo.HREF AS HREF, tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCTITLE AS DOCTITLE, tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCNO AS DOCNO, tbl_aprdocinfo.HASATTACHYN AS HASATTACHYN, tbl_aprdocinfo.HASOPINIONYN AS HASOPINIONYN, tbl_aprdocinfo.STARTDATE AS STARTDATE, tbl_aprdocinfo.ENDDATE AS ENDDATE, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERID AS WRITERID, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERNAME AS WRITERNAME, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERJOBTITLE AS WRITERJOBTITLE, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTID AS WRITERDEPTID, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTNAME AS WRITERDEPTNAME, tbl_aprdocinfo.ISPUBLIC AS ISPUBLIC, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERNAME2 AS WRITERNAME2, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERJOBTITLE2 AS WRITERJOBTITLE2, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTNAME2 AS WRITERDEPTNAME2, tbl_aprdocinfo.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, tbl_aprdocinfo.COMPANYID AS COMPANYID, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERSN AS APRMEMBERSN, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRTYPE AS APRTYPE, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRSTATE AS APRSTATE, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERID AS APRMEMBERID, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERNAME AS APRMEMBERNAME, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERNAME2 AS APRMEMBERNAME2, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE AS APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 AS APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTID AS APRMEMBERDEPTID, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME AS APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 AS APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, tbl_aprlineinfo.RECEIVEDDATE AS RECEIVEDDATE, tbl_expaprdocinfo.FORMNAME AS FORMNAME, tbl_expaprdocinfo.FORMNAME2 AS FORMNAME2, tbl_expaprdocinfo.URGENTAPPROVAL AS URGENTAPPROVAL, tbl_deptmaster.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 AS companyName, tbl_deptmaster.COMPNM2 AS companyName2 FROM (((tbl_aprdocinfo JOIN tbl_aprlineinfo ON (tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCID = tbl_aprlineinfo.DOCID AND tbl_aprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_aprlineinfo.TENANT_ID AND tbl_aprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_aprlineinfo.COMPANYID)) JOIN tbl_expaprdocinfo ON (tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCID = tbl_expaprdocinfo.DOCID AND tbl_aprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_expaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID AND tbl_aprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_expaprdocinfo.COMPANYID)) JOIN tbl_deptmaster ON (tbl_aprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_deptmaster.CN AND tbl_aprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_deptmaster.TENANT_ID)) WHERE (tbl_aprlineinfo.APRSTATE = '002' OR tbl_aprlineinfo.APRSTATE = '005') AND NOT (TBL_APRDOCINFO.functiontype = '004' AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.aprtype = '007') AND tbl_aprdocinfo.STARTDATE IS NOT NULL

ALTER VIEW vendchamjodocinfo AS SELECT tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCID AS DOCID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.FORMID AS FORMID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.ORGDOCID AS ORGDOCID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCTYPE AS DOCTYPE, '017' AS DOCSTATE, '002' AS FUNCTIONTYPE, tbl_endaprdocinfo.HREF AS HREF, tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCTITLE AS DOCTITLE, tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCNO AS DOCNO, tbl_endaprdocinfo.HASATTACHYN AS HASATTACHYN, tbl_endaprdocinfo.HASOPINIONYN AS HASOPINIONYN, tbl_endaprdocinfo.STARTDATE AS STARTDATE, tbl_endaprdocinfo.ENDDATE AS ENDDATE, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERID AS WRITERID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERNAME AS WRITERNAME, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERJOBTITLE AS WRITERJOBTITLE, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTID AS WRITERDEPTID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTNAME AS WRITERDEPTNAME, tbl_endaprdocinfo.ISPUBLIC AS ISPUBLIC, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERNAME2 AS WRITERNAME2, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERJOBTITLE2 AS WRITERJOBTITLE2, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTNAME2 AS WRITERDEPTNAME2, tbl_endaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.COMPANYID AS COMPANYID, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERSN AS APRMEMBERSN, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRTYPE AS APRTYPE, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRSTATE AS APRSTATE, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERID AS APRMEMBERID, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERNAME AS APRMEMBERNAME, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERNAME2 AS APRMEMBERNAME2, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE AS APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 AS APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTID AS APRMEMBERDEPTID, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME AS APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 AS APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, tbl_endaprlineinfo.RECEIVEDDATE AS RECEIVEDDATE, tbl_expendaprdocinfo.FORMNAME AS FORMNAME, tbl_expendaprdocinfo.FORMNAME2 AS FORMNAME2, tbl_expendaprdocinfo.URGENTAPPROVAL AS URGENTAPPROVAL, tbl_deptmaster.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 AS companyName, tbl_deptmaster.COMPNM2 AS companyName2 FROM (((tbl_endaprdocinfo JOIN tbl_endaprlineinfo ON (tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCID = tbl_endaprlineinfo.DOCID AND tbl_endaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_endaprlineinfo.TENANT_ID AND tbl_endaprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_endaprlineinfo.COMPANYID)) JOIN tbl_expendaprdocinfo ON (tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCID = tbl_expendaprdocinfo.DOCID AND tbl_endaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_expendaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID AND tbl_endaprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_expendaprdocinfo.COMPANYID)) JOIN tbl_deptmaster ON (tbl_endaprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_deptmaster.CN AND tbl_endaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_deptmaster.TENANT_ID)) WHERE tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRTYPE = '007' AND tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRSTATE = '002' AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docstate <> '031'
sqlMap.update: ALTER TABLE jmocha_address_info ADD COLUMN s_furigana VARCHAR(120) NULL DEFAULT NULL AFTER s_type
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `tbl_opengovdocinfo` ( `docid` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `openflag` char(9) DEFAULT NULL, `basis` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8 DEFAULT NULL, `reason` varchar(1000) CHARACTER SET utf8 DEFAULT NULL, `openlimitdate` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `createdate` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `updatedate` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `tenant_id` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, `companyid` varchar(20) NOT NULL, `listopenflag` char(2) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`docid`,`tenant_id`,`companyid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE `tbl_opengovfileinfo` ( `DOCID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `SN` bigint(10) NOT NULL, `FILEOPENFLAG` char(1) DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANYID` varchar(20) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`DOCID`,`SN`,`COMPANYID`,`TENANT_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='мЫРлђЄм†Хл≥ік≥µк∞Ь м≤®лґАнММмЭЉ нЕМмЭілЄФ';
ALTER TABLE TBL_FORMINFO ADD ( OPENGOVFLAG VARCHAR(4) DEFAULT 'N' )
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(DEPTID) FROM (SELECT DEPTID FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER TD ON (A.DEPTID = TD.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = TD.TENANT_ID) WHERE A.CN = #userID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# UNION SELECT DEPARTMENT AS DEPTID FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) D WHERE D.DEPTID = #deptID#
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `jmocha_user_distribution` ( `DOMAIN_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `USER_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `OWNER_ID` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `DISCLOSURE_POLICY` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `EXPLAINATION` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `DL_END_DATE` date DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`DOMAIN_NAME`,`USER_NAME`), KEY `foreign_keys_index` (`DOMAIN_NAME`,`USER_NAME`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE `jmocha_user_distribution_mem` ( `DOMAIN_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `USER_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `MEMBER_ID` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `REG_DATE` date NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`DOMAIN_NAME`,`USER_NAME`,`MEMBER_ID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE `jmocha_user_dist_apply` ( `DOMAIN_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `USER_NAME` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `APPLICANT_ID` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `APPLICANT_DATE` date NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`DOMAIN_NAME`,`USER_NAME`,`APPLICANT_ID`), KEY `foreign_keys_index` (`DOMAIN_NAME`,`USER_NAME`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE `tbl_yearlydoccount`( `DOC_COUNT` mediumint(11), `DOC_TYPE` VARCHAR(100) COMMENT 'INSEND: лВілґАл∞ЬмЖ°, OUTSEND: мЩЄлґАл∞ЬмЖ°, OUTRECIEVE: мЩЄлґАмИШмЛ†', `MONTH_TYPE` VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '1 ~ 12мЫФ, мЮСлЕД-10(2) ~ 0(12) мЫФ', `CREATE_ID` VARCHAR(80) , `CREATE_DATE` datetime DEFAULT current_timestamp(), `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5), `COMPANYID` VARCHAR(80) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

ALTER TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER ADD SUBDEPT_PERMITTED INT DEFAULT '0'

CREATE TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILEUSER ( `SEQ_ID` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, `FILE_ID` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, `USER_ID` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, `USER_TYPE` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, `CREATE_ID` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, `CREATE_DATE` DATE NOT NULL, `COMPANY_ID` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` INT(7) NOT NULL, `SUBDEPT_PERMITTED` INT(11) DEFAULT '0', PRIMARY KEY (`SEQ_ID`, `TENANT_ID`) )
CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_FOLDERUSER MINVALUE 1000 MAXVALUE 9999999999999999999999999999 INCREMENT BY 1 START WITH 1000 NOORDER NOCYCLE NOKEEP GLOBAL
CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_FILEUSER MINVALUE 1000 MAXVALUE 9999999999999999999999999999 INCREMENT BY 1 START WITH 1000 NOORDER NOCYCLE NOKEEP GLOBAL
ALTER TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER ADD FOLDER_MANAGER INT(11) DEFAULT '0'
sqlMap.select: SELECT DISTINCT group_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND ( (member_type = 'USER' AND member_id = #userId#) OR (member_type = 'DEPT' AND (member_id = #deptId# OR member_id IN (SELECT deptid FROM tbl_addjobmaster WHERE cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#))) OR (member_type = 'JIKWI' AND member_id IN ( SELECT extensionattribute7 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# UNION SELECT jobid FROM tbl_addjobmaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# ) ) OR (member_type = 'JIKCHEK' AND member_id = (SELECT extensionattribute8 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#)) OR ( member_type = 'DEPT' AND sub_dept_yn = 'Y' AND ( (SELECT group_concat(dept_cd_path separator ',') as a FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE cn = #deptId# OR CN IN (SELECT deptid FROM tbl_addjobmaster WHERE cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#)) REGEXP CONCAT(',', member_id, ',' ) ) ) )
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENCRYPTED_FILE ( FILE_ID VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, VERSION INT(7) NOT NULL, TENANT_ID INT(7) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT WEBFOLDER_ENCRYPTED_FILE_PK PRIMARY KEY (`FILE_ID`, `VERSION`, `TENANT_ID`) )
ALTER TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE ADD VERSION INT(7) DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL

CREATE TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE_HISTORY ( `FILE_ID` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, `VERSION` INT(7) DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL, `FILE_PATH` VARCHAR(250) NOT NULL, `FILE_SIZE` BIGINT(20) NOT NULL, `USE_STATUS` VARCHAR(250) DEFAULT 'Y' NOT NULL, `UPDATE_DATE` DATETIME NOT NULL, `UPDATE_ID` VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL, `UPDATE_NAME` VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL, `UPDATE_NAME2` VARCHAR(120), `DELETER_ID` VARCHAR(100), `TENANT_ID` INT(7) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE_HISTORY_PK PRIMARY KEY (`FILE_ID`, `VERSION`, `TENANT_ID`) )
ALTER TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE ADD DEPTH INT(7) DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL
ALTER TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE ADD ROOT_ID VARCHAR(100)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET ROOT_ID = FILE_ID
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE ADD PARENT_ID VARCHAR(100)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET PARENT_ID = FILE_ID
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE ADD HIERARCHICAL_PATH VARCHAR(300)

sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_LOG ADD ( FILE_ID VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, VERSION INT(7) DEFAULT NULL, FOLDER_ID VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, FOLDER_NAME VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL, FOLDER_PATH VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL, FOLDER_PATH_NAME VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL, TOP_FOLDER_ID VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, TOP_FOLDER_NAME VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL )

ALTER TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_APPLY_HISTORY ADD ( APPROVAL_STATUS VARCHAR(10), APPROVAL_STATUS_UPDATEDT DATETIME )

CREATE TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_APPLY_HISTORY ( APPLY_ID VARCHAR(40), TENANT_ID INT(5), COMPANY_ID VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL, FOLDER_NAME VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL, CONTENT VARCHAR(1000), APPLICATION_DATE DATETIME NOT NULL, APPROVAL_STATUS VARCHAR(10), APPROVAL_STATUS_UPDATEDT DATETIME, CONSTRAINT `PK2_TBL_WF_APPLY_HISTORY` PRIMARY KEY (`APPLY_ID`) )

CREATE TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_APPLY_HIST_MEM ( APPLY_ID VARCHAR(40), MEMBER_ID VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL, MEMBER_NAME VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL, MEMBER_TYPE VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, MEMBER_ITEM VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT `PK2_TBL_WF_APPLY_HIST_MEM` PRIMARY KEY (`APPLY_ID`,`MEMBER_ID`,`MEMBER_TYPE`,`MEMBER_ITEM`) )

CREATE TABLE `tbl_car` ( `CAR_ID` bigint(10) NOT NULL, `CAR_NAME` varchar(510) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `CAR_NAME2` varchar(510) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `CAR_NM` varchar(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `CAR_GB` varchar(2) DEFAULT NULL, `CAR_LEVEL` bigint(10) DEFAULT 0, `CAR_STEP` bigint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `CAR_ACCESS` varchar(2000) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `CAR_UPPER` bigint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `OWNDEPTID` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `OWNDEPTNM` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `OWNDEPTNM2` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `OWNERID` varchar(2000) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `OWNERNM` varchar(32) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `OWNERNM2` varchar(32) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `OWNERPOSITION` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `OWNERPOSITION2` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `OWNERCALL` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `CAR_REGISTER_DATE` varchar(16) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `DELFLAG` varchar(2) NOT NULL, `COMPANYID` varchar(40) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `CAR_URL` varchar(40) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `CAR_EXPLAIN` varchar(40) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`TENANT_ID`,`CAR_ID`,`COMPANYID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

CREATE TABLE `tbl_car_acl` ( `CAR_ID` varchar(40) NOT NULL, `MEMBER_NAM` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `MEMBER_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `ACCESS_LVL` varchar(2) DEFAULT NULL, `DEPT_YN` varchar(2) DEFAULT NULL, `SDA_YN` varchar(2) DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANYID` varchar(40) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY (`TENANT_ID`,`CAR_ID`,`MEMBER_ID`,`COMPANYID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

CREATE TABLE `tbl_car_attach` ( `ATTACHID` bigint(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `CAR_ID` varchar(40) NOT NULL, `FILESIZE` bigint(10) NOT NULL, `FILENAME` varchar(500) NOT NULL, `FILEPATH` varchar(500) NOT NULL, `COMPANYID` varchar(40) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`ATTACHID`,`TENANT_ID`,`COMPANYID`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=93 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4

CREATE TABLE `tbl_car_form` ( `CAR_FORM_ID` bigint(40) NOT NULL, `CAR_ID` varchar(40) NOT NULL, `REGISTER_ID` varchar(80) NOT NULL, `REGISTER_DATE` date DEFAULT NULL, `REV_DATE` date DEFAULT NULL, `REV_TIME` varchar(45) DEFAULT NULL, `REV_TIME2` varchar(45) DEFAULT NULL, `DRIVER_DEPTNAME` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL, `DRIVER_NAME` varchar(80) DEFAULT NULL, `B_DEPT_ID` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `B_DEPART_TIME` varchar(16) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `B_DISTANCE` varchar(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `DRIVE_PURPOSE` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL, `DRIVE_POINT` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `A_ARRIVE_TIME` varchar(16) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `A_DISTANCE` varchar(40) DEFAULT NULL, `A_DISTANCE_AUTO` varchar(40) DEFAULT NULL, `A_DISTANCE_COMMUTE` varchar(40) DEFAULT NULL, `A_DISTANCE_WORK` varchar(40) DEFAULT NULL, `A_DISTANCE_ETC` varchar(40) DEFAULT NULL, `A_SUBMIT_FLAG` varchar(2) DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANYID` varchar(40) NOT NULL, `TENANT_ID` mediumint(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `CAR_REGISTER_NO` bigint(20) NOT NULL, `DELFLAG` varchar(2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', PRIMARY KEY (`CAR_FORM_ID`,`CAR_ID`,`COMPANYID`,`TENANT_ID`,`CAR_REGISTER_NO`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

ALTER VIEW `vtaskclass` AS SELECT `tbl_taskcategory`.`CATEGORYCODE` AS `CATEGORYCODE`, `tbl_taskcategory`.`NAME` AS `CNAME`, `tbl_taskcategory`.`NAME2` AS `CNAME2`, `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`MCATEGORYCODE` AS `MCATEGORYCODE`, `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`NAME` AS `MCNAME`, `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`NAME2` AS `MCNAME2`, `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`SUBCATEGORYCODE` AS `SUBCATEGORYCODE`, `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`NAME` AS `SCNAME`, `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`NAME2` AS `SCNAME2`, `tbl_taskcode`.`TASKCODE` AS `TASKCODE`, `tbl_taskcode`.`TASKNAME` AS `TASKNAME`, `tbl_taskcode`.`TASKNAME2` AS `TASKNAME2`, `tbl_taskcode`.`KEEPINGPERIOD` AS `KEEPINGPERIOD`, `tbl_taskcode`.`DISPLAYRECFLAG` AS `DISPLAYRECFLAG`, `tbl_taskcode`.`SPECIALCATALOGFLAG` AS `SPECIALCATALOGFLAG`, `tbl_taskcode`.`SC1` AS `SC1`, `tbl_taskcode`.`SC2` AS `SC2`, `tbl_taskcode`.`SC3` AS `SC3`, `tbl_taskcode`.`TEMPFLAG` AS `TEMPFLAG`, `tbl_taskcode`.`COMPANYID` AS `COMPANYID`, `tbl_taskcode`.`TENANT_ID` AS `TENANT_ID`, `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`PROCESSDEPTCODE` AS `PROCESSDEPTCODE`, `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`PROCESSDEPTNAME` AS `PROCESSDEPTNAME`, `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`PROCESSDEPTNAME2` AS `PROCESSDEPTNAME2`, `tbl_taskcode`.`KEEPINGMETHOD` AS `KEEPINGMETHOD`, `tbl_taskcode`.`KEEPINGPLACE` AS `KEEPINGPLACE`, `tbl_taskcode`.`DISPLAYRECTRASTIME` AS `DISPLAYRECTRASTIME`, `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`DELFLAG` AS `DELFLAG`, `tbl_taskcategory`.`OLDFLAG` AS `OLDFLAG_TOP`, `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`OLDFLAG` AS `OLDFLAG_MID`, `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`OLDFLAG` AS `OLDFLAG_SUB` FROM ((((`tbl_taskcategory` JOIN `tbl_taskmiddlecategory` ON (`tbl_taskcategory`.`CATEGORYCODE` = `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`CATEGORYCODE` AND `tbl_taskcategory`.`TENANT_ID` = `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`TENANT_ID` AND `tbl_taskcategory`.`COMPANYID` = `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`COMPANYID`)) JOIN `tbl_tasksubcategory` ON (`tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`MCATEGORYCODE` = `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`MCATEGORYCODE` AND `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`TENANT_ID` = `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`TENANT_ID` AND `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`COMPANYID` = `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`COMPANYID`)) JOIN `tbl_taskcode` ON (`tbl_tasksubcategory`.`SUBCATEGORYCODE` = `tbl_taskcode`.`SUBCATEGORYCODE` AND `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`TENANT_ID` = `tbl_taskcode`.`TENANT_ID` AND `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`COMPANYID` = `tbl_taskcode`.`COMPANYID` AND `tbl_taskcode`.`DELFLAG` = '0')) LEFT JOIN `tbl_task_deptinfo` ON (`tbl_taskcode`.`TASKCODE` = `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`TASKCODE` AND `tbl_taskcode`.`TENANT_ID` = `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`TENANT_ID` AND `tbl_taskcode`.`COMPANYID` = `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`COMPANYID`)) WHERE `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`DELFLAG` = '0' OR `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`DELFLAG` IS NULL OR `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`DELFLAG` = '2'

ALTER VIEW `svtaskclass` AS SELECT `tbl_taskcategory`.`CATEGORYCODE` AS `CATEGORYCODE`, `tbl_taskcategory`.`NAME` AS `CNAME`, `tbl_taskcategory`.`NAME2` AS `CNAME2`, `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`MCATEGORYCODE` AS `MCATEGORYCODE`, `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`NAME` AS `MCNAME`, `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`NAME2` AS `MCNAME2`, `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`SUBCATEGORYCODE` AS `SUBCATEGORYCODE`, `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`NAME` AS `SCNAME`, `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`NAME2` AS `SCNAME2`, `tbl_taskcode`.`TASKCODE` AS `TASKCODE`, `tbl_taskcode`.`TASKNAME` AS `TASKNAME`, `tbl_taskcode`.`TASKNAME2` AS `TASKNAME2`, `tbl_taskcode`.`KEEPINGPERIOD` AS `KEEPINGPERIOD`, `tbl_taskcode`.`DISPLAYRECFLAG` AS `DISPLAYRECFLAG`, `tbl_taskcode`.`SPECIALCATALOGFLAG` AS `SPECIALCATALOGFLAG`, `tbl_taskcode`.`TEMPFLAG` AS `TEMPFLAG`, `tbl_taskcode`.`COMPANYID` AS `COMPANYID`, `tbl_taskcode`.`TENANT_ID` AS `TENANT_ID`, `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`PROCESSDEPTCODE` AS `PROCESSDEPTCODE`, `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`PROCESSDEPTNAME` AS `PROCESSDEPTNAME`, `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`PROCESSDEPTNAME2` AS `PROCESSDEPTNAME2`, `tbl_taskcode`.`KEEPINGMETHOD` AS `KEEPINGMETHOD`, `tbl_taskcode`.`KEEPINGPLACE` AS `KEEPINGPLACE`, `tbl_taskcode`.`DISPLAYRECTRASTIME` AS `DISPLAYRECTRASTIME`, `tbl_taskcode`.`ISPUBLIC` AS `ISPUBLIC`, `tbl_taskcode`.`ITEMSECURITY` AS `ITEMSECURITY`, `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`DELFLAG` AS `DELFLAG`, `tbl_taskcategory`.`OLDFLAG` AS `OLDFLAG_TOP`, `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`OLDFLAG` AS `OLDFLAG_MID`, `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`OLDFLAG` AS `OLDFLAG_SUB` FROM ((((`tbl_taskcategory` JOIN `tbl_taskmiddlecategory` ON (`tbl_taskcategory`.`CATEGORYCODE` = `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`CATEGORYCODE` AND `tbl_taskcategory`.`TENANT_ID` = `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`TENANT_ID` AND `tbl_taskcategory`.`COMPANYID` = `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`COMPANYID`)) JOIN `tbl_tasksubcategory` ON (`tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`MCATEGORYCODE` = `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`MCATEGORYCODE` AND `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`TENANT_ID` = `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`TENANT_ID` AND `tbl_taskmiddlecategory`.`COMPANYID` = `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`COMPANYID`)) JOIN `tbl_taskcode` ON (`tbl_tasksubcategory`.`SUBCATEGORYCODE` = `tbl_taskcode`.`SUBCATEGORYCODE` AND `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`TENANT_ID` = `tbl_taskcode`.`TENANT_ID` AND `tbl_tasksubcategory`.`COMPANYID` = `tbl_taskcode`.`COMPANYID`)) LEFT JOIN `tbl_task_deptinfo` ON (`tbl_taskcode`.`TASKCODE` = `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`TASKCODE` AND `tbl_taskcode`.`TENANT_ID` = `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`TENANT_ID` AND `tbl_taskcode`.`COMPANYID` = `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`COMPANYID`)) WHERE `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`DELFLAG` = '0' OR `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`DELFLAG` IS NULL OR `tbl_task_deptinfo`.`DELFLAG` = '2'

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_INFO ( SEQUENCE INT(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, USERID VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL, USERNM VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, USERNM2 VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, DEPTID VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL, DEPTNM VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, DEPTNM2 VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, TITLE VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, TITLE2 VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, COMPANYID VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL, COMPANYNM VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, COMPANYNM2 VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, ACCESSIP VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL, ACCESSINFO VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL, ACCESSTIME DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, ACCESSBROWSER VARCHAR(40) DEFAULT NULL, ACCESSOS VARCHAR(80) DEFAULT NULL, ACCESSAGENT VARCHAR(1000) DEFAULT NULL, ADMINTYPE VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL, TENANT_ID DECIMAL(22,0) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY (`SEQUENCE`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS TBL_PERMISSION_CHANGE_INFO ( `SEQUENCE` INT(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `USERID` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL, `USERNM` VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `USERNM2` VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `DEPTID` VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL, `DEPTNM` VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `DEPTNM2` VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `TITLE` VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `TITLE2` VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANYID` VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANYNM` VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `COMPANYNM2` VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `AUTHORIZEDTIME` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, `ADMINTYPE` VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL, `STATUS` VARCHAR(40) DEFAULT NULL, `AUTHORIZERID` VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `AUTHORIZERNM` VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `AUTHORIZERNM2` VARCHAR(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 DEFAULT NULL, `AUTHORIZERIP` VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL, `TENANT_ID` DECIMAL(22,0) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY (`SEQUENCE`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_FORM SET FORM_HTML2 = CASE WHEN FORM_ID = 0 THEN 'NameDate ~ Contact information Substitute ' WHEN FORM_ID = 1 THEN 'Date ' WHEN FORM_ID = 2 THEN 'Date ' WHEN FORM_ID = 3 THEN 'Date ' WHEN FORM_ID = 4 THEN 'NameDate Contact information Substitute ' WHEN FORM_ID = 5 THEN 'NameDate Contact information Substitute ' WHEN FORM_ID = 6 THEN 'NameDate ~ Contact information Substitute ' WHEN FORM_ID = 7 THEN 'NameDate ~ Workplace Contact information Substitute ' WHEN FORM_ID = 8 THEN 'NameDate All day ~ Workplace Contact information Substitute ' WHEN FORM_ID = 9 THEN 'NameDate ~ Contact information Substitute ' WHEN FORM_ID = 10 THEN 'NameDate ~ Contact information ' ELSE NULL END WHERE FORM_HTML2 IS NULL
